content: Official Svelte 5 docs support using $state for local reactive arrays/objects and $derived for computed data. $effect runs after mount/DOM updates and not during SSR, but Svelte docs frame it as an escape hatch for browser APIs/direct DOM, not for synchronizing derived state. For this static browser-only quote list, keep list state in a focused module/component, derive provider coverage from catalog data, and use effects only to load/save localStorage or manage browser-only integration.
